title: About Hemp and Canada's Hemp Industry - Canada.ca
content:
## About Hemp and Canada's Hemp Industry
New information on this topic will be available soon. In the meantime, please visit the Industrial hemp licensing application guide for current information on how to get an industrial hemp licence.
The following pages will provide researchers and persons new to the hemp industry with useful information and resources. You will gain an overview of the industry and its growth in recent years. You will also find lists of producers and processors which will be useful if you are looking to develop or commercialize new hemp products.
